example: The museum covers a broad spectrum of modern artistic styles.
exampleZh: 这座博物馆涵盖了广泛的现代艺术风格。

example: The building was formerly used as a public library.
exampleZh: 这栋建筑以前曾被用作公共图书馆。

example: Decisions move slowly through the organization's complex management hierarchy.
exampleZh: 决策在该组织复杂的管理层级中推进得很慢。

example: The pope addressed thousands of visitors in the square.
exampleZh: 教皇在广场上向数千名访客发表讲话。

example: New equipment has greatly improved productivity at the factory.
exampleZh: 新设备大幅提高了工厂的生产率。

example: Each participant completed a questionnaire about daily exercise habits.
exampleZh: 每位参与者都填写了一份关于日常运动习惯的问卷。

example: The doctrine influenced political thought for several generations.
exampleZh: 这一学说影响了好几代人的政治思想。

example: She chose sociology because she wanted to understand social change.
exampleZh: 她选择社会学，因为她想理解社会变迁。

example: Reliable transport infrastructure is essential for regional economic growth.
exampleZh: 可靠的交通基础设施对地区经济增长至关重要。

example: Researchers selected two hundred households through a random process.
exampleZh: 研究人员通过随机程序选取了两百户家庭。

example: We need a realistic schedule that everyone can follow.
exampleZh: 我们需要一份每个人都能遵守的现实时间表。

example: Please check that every address has been entered correctly.
exampleZh: 请检查每个地址是否都已正确输入。

example: The clinic specializes in treating patients with chronic pain.
exampleZh: 这家诊所专门治疗慢性疼痛患者。

example: Both warning lights began flashing simultaneously during the test.
exampleZh: 测试期间，两盏警示灯同时开始闪烁。

example: A sudden drop in temperature can trigger equipment failure.
exampleZh: 气温突然下降可能引发设备故障。

example: The rapid adoption of digital payments changed consumer behavior.
exampleZh: 数字支付的迅速采用改变了消费者行为。

example: The court decided to convict him after reviewing the evidence.
exampleZh: 法院在审查证据后决定判他有罪。

example: You can find her number in the staff directory.
exampleZh: 你可以在员工名录中找到她的号码。

example: Union members will vote by secret ballot tomorrow morning.
exampleZh: 工会成员将在明天上午进行无记名投票。

example: A spider built an intricate web between two branches.
exampleZh: 一只蜘蛛在两根树枝之间织了一张复杂的网。

example: There is no justification for treating employees so unfairly.
exampleZh: 没有任何理由可以为如此不公平地对待员工辩护。

example: The dean welcomed new students at the opening ceremony.
exampleZh: 院长在开学典礼上欢迎了新生。

example: The discovery had a profound effect on modern medical science.
exampleZh: 这项发现对现代医学产生了深远影响。

example: Environmental groups continue to lobby for stricter pollution controls.
exampleZh: 环保组织继续游说政府实行更严格的污染管控。

example: The government voted to abolish the outdated licensing system.
exampleZh: 政府投票决定废除过时的许可制度。

example: Patience is a valuable trait in an effective teacher.
exampleZh: 耐心是一名优秀教师的宝贵品质。

example: The young singer became an international sensation almost overnight.
exampleZh: 这位年轻歌手几乎一夜之间轰动了国际乐坛。

example: Several witnesses allege that safety warnings were deliberately ignored.
exampleZh: 几名证人声称安全警告被故意忽视了。

example: Drivers pay a higher insurance premium for powerful sports cars.
exampleZh: 高性能跑车的驾驶者要支付更高的保险费。

example: Please confirm the availability of meeting rooms before Friday.
exampleZh: 请在星期五前确认会议室是否可用。

example: Detailed survey results are included in the report's appendix.
exampleZh: 详细的调查结果收录在报告的附录中。

example: The online forum allows residents to discuss local issues openly.
exampleZh: 这个在线论坛允许居民公开讨论当地问题。

example: Employees may include their spouse in the health insurance plan.
exampleZh: 员工可以把配偶纳入医疗保险计划。

example: Every employee received a bonus after the successful year.
exampleZh: 公司业绩良好后，每位员工都获得了奖金。

example: This soup contains too much sodium for a healthy diet.
exampleZh: 这碗汤的钠含量过高，不适合健康饮食。

example: The restaurant can cater for up to two hundred guests.
exampleZh: 这家餐厅最多可以为两百位客人提供餐饮服务。

example: The Chinese minister met her European counterpart in Beijing.
exampleZh: 中国部长在北京会见了她的欧洲同行。

example: We had a marvellous view of the mountains at sunrise.
exampleZh: 日出时，我们欣赏到了壮丽的山景。

example: The rescue continued amid heavy rain and strong winds.
exampleZh: 救援工作在大雨和强风中继续进行。

example: The local trader sells fruit grown on nearby farms.
exampleZh: 这位当地商人出售附近农场种植的水果。

example: Doctors used several tests to diagnose the rare condition.
exampleZh: 医生通过多项检查诊断这种罕见疾病。

example: The planners envisage a cleaner city with better public transport.
exampleZh: 规划者设想建设一座公共交通更好、更清洁的城市。

example: Both sides made a concession to keep negotiations moving.
exampleZh: 双方都作出了让步，以推动谈判继续进行。

example: The company refused to concede that its product was unsafe.
exampleZh: 公司拒绝承认其产品存在安全问题。

example: Personality differences sometimes clash during stressful group projects.
exampleZh: 在压力较大的小组项目中，性格差异有时会引发冲突。

example: Each branch operates as a separate legal entity.
exampleZh: 每家分支机构都作为独立的法律实体运营。

example: Space exploration has produced many useful technologies on Earth.
exampleZh: 太空探索为地球带来了许多实用技术。

example: Several independent nations belong to the same commonwealth.
exampleZh: 几个独立国家同属于一个联邦组织。

example: The parent company sold its loss-making overseas subsidiary.
exampleZh: 母公司出售了亏损的海外子公司。

example: Vaccination greatly reduced the incidence of the disease.
exampleZh: 疫苗接种大幅降低了这种疾病的发生率。

example: Every scholarship recipient must submit an annual progress report.
exampleZh: 每位奖学金获得者都必须提交年度进展报告。

example: The butterfly has striking blue markings on its wings.
exampleZh: 这只蝴蝶的翅膀上有醒目的蓝色斑纹。

example: The documentary offers a fascinating look at ocean life.
exampleZh: 这部纪录片生动展现了迷人的海洋生命。

example: The concert was organized as a tribute to the composer.
exampleZh: 这场音乐会是为向这位作曲家致敬而举办的。

example: Regular maintenance helps minimize the risk of sudden breakdowns.
exampleZh: 定期维护有助于把突发故障的风险降到最低。

example: Please edit the document carefully before sending it to clients.
exampleZh: 把文件发给客户前，请认真编辑。

example: The fire caused one casualty and damaged three nearby buildings.
exampleZh: 这场火灾造成一人伤亡，并损坏了附近三栋建筑。

example: Careful planning can prevent waste and protect the remainder.
exampleZh: 仔细规划可以避免浪费并保护剩余部分。

example: Education plays a key role in disease prevention.
exampleZh: 教育在疾病预防中发挥着关键作用。

example: Housing costs are especially high in the metropolitan area.
exampleZh: 大都市地区的住房成本尤其高。

example: The instrument's sensitivity allows it to detect tiny movements.
exampleZh: 该仪器的灵敏度使其能够检测微小运动。

example: The manager checks the warehouse inventory at the end of each month.
exampleZh: 经理在每月底核对仓库存货清单。

example: Her exceptional ability earned her a place on the national team.
exampleZh: 她出众的能力使她入选了国家队。

example: Officials underestimated the magnitude of the environmental damage.
exampleZh: 官员低估了环境破坏的严重程度。

example: The program gained popularity through positive recommendations from students.
exampleZh: 这个项目通过学生的积极推荐而广受欢迎。

example: Children must use the equipment under adult supervision.
exampleZh: 儿童必须在成人监督下使用该设备。

example: Wet clothes cling to the body in humid weather.
exampleZh: 潮湿天气里，湿衣服会紧贴身体。

example: Basic safety training is compulsory for all new workers.
exampleZh: 基础安全培训是所有新员工的必修内容。

example: Scientists noticed a strong similarity between the two samples.
exampleZh: 科学家注意到两个样本之间高度相似。

example: The annual family gathering takes place during the spring festival.
exampleZh: 一年一度的家庭聚会在春节期间举行。

example: Late payment may incur an additional administrative charge.
exampleZh: 逾期付款可能会产生额外的管理费用。

example: The railway connects several major cities across continental Europe.
exampleZh: 这条铁路连接了欧洲大陆的几个主要城市。

example: Their friendship gradually developed into a quiet romance.
exampleZh: 他们的友谊逐渐发展成一段平静的恋情。

example: The organization publishes its financial report annually in March.
exampleZh: 该组织每年三月发布财务报告。

example: The family raises cattle on a large western ranch.
exampleZh: 这家人在西部的一个大牧场养牛。

example: We reached a verbal agreement but signed nothing.
exampleZh: 我们达成了口头协议，但没有签署任何文件。

example: Many coastal communities depend heavily on fishing and tourism.
exampleZh: 许多沿海社区高度依赖渔业和旅游业。

example: The final design is substantially different from the original proposal.
exampleZh: 最终设计与原提案有很大不同。

example: Water is the main constituent of most living cells.
exampleZh: 水是大多数活细胞的主要成分。

example: Public sentiment shifted in favor of stronger environmental laws.
exampleZh: 公众情绪转向支持更严格的环境法律。

example: An interim manager will lead the department until June.
exampleZh: 在六月之前，一名临时经理将负责该部门。

example: Temperature is an important parameter in this chemical reaction.
exampleZh: 温度是这一化学反应中的重要参数。

example: The market gradually returned to equilibrium after prices stabilized.
exampleZh: 价格稳定后，市场逐渐恢复了均衡。

example: Her lifelong quest for knowledge took her around the world.
exampleZh: 她对知识的终身追求带她走遍了世界。

example: He gave the table a firm slap to get everyone's attention.
exampleZh: 他用力拍了一下桌子，以吸引所有人的注意。

example: Workers must wear masks when handling toxic chemicals.
exampleZh: 工人处理有毒化学品时必须佩戴口罩。

example: The community shared her grief after the tragic accident.
exampleZh: 悲剧事故发生后，社区民众分担了她的悲痛。

example: A communication breakdown caused confusion between the two teams.
exampleZh: 沟通中断导致两个团队之间产生了混乱。

example: The busiest roads are invariably crowded during the morning rush.
exampleZh: 最繁忙的道路在早高峰期间总是十分拥堵。

example: Details of the forthcoming exhibition will be announced next week.
exampleZh: 即将举行的展览详情将在下周公布。

example: She faced a dilemma between career growth and family responsibilities.
exampleZh: 她面临事业发展与家庭责任之间的两难处境。

example: The researchers studied plant growth in previously virgin soil.
exampleZh: 研究人员研究了植物在未开垦土壤中的生长情况。

example: The chef added fresh shrimp to the spicy soup.
exampleZh: 厨师在辣汤里加入了新鲜的虾。

example: The actor wore a traditional costume during the performance.
exampleZh: 演员在表演期间穿着传统服装。

example: Their correspondence continued for many years after graduation.
exampleZh: 毕业后，他们的通信持续了很多年。

example: The newspaper published a cartoon criticizing the new policy.
exampleZh: 报纸刊登了一幅批评新政策的漫画。

example: The jury returned a guilty verdict after three hours.
exampleZh: 陪审团在三小时后作出了有罪裁决。

example: The building was deemed unsafe after a detailed inspection.
exampleZh: 经过详细检查，这栋建筑被认定为不安全。

example: Poor management eventually drove the small company into bankruptcy.
exampleZh: 管理不善最终使这家小公司破产。

example: International collaboration helped researchers solve the difficult technical problem.
exampleZh: 国际合作帮助研究人员解决了这一技术难题。
